title: Junior SEO Specialist at Just Herbs

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Just Herbs
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Just Herbs! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Just Herbs:
Just Herbs is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Just Herbs!
